description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomous mode was stopped at a traffic light on Brannan Street at 7th Street when a passenger vehicle hit the Zoox 
vehicle from behind. The passenger vehicle left the scene without exchanging information. There were no injuries and the police were not 
called. 
Print
Clear Form
